words.meaning: 顺便一提 / 顺带说一下 / 附带地

sentences.text: The project is going well. Incidentally, the client mentioned a new requirement.
sentences.translation: 项目进展顺利。顺便说一下，客户提到了一个新需求。

sentences.text: The bug was discovered incidentally during regression testing.
sentences.translation: 这个 bug 是在回归测试中偶然发现的。

sentences.text: The feature was added incidentally as part of a larger update.
sentences.translation: 这个功能是附带地在更大的更新中加进去的。

sentences.text: The DELETE script has been executed successfully. Incidentally, the SR you referenced has already been marked as Completed. Kindly advise on next steps.
sentences.translation: DELETE 脚本已成功执行。顺便一提，您提到的 SR 已被标记为已完成。请告知后续步骤。

sentences.text: Coincidentally, I met John yesterday too
sentences.translation: 巧合的是，我昨天也见到 John 了。（强调巧合

sentences.text: Thanks for confirming the audit log. Separately, could you also confirm the database timeout
sentences.translation: 感谢您确认审计日志。另外，能否也确认一下数据库的超时设置？

words.meaning: 过去某段时期的，句号（美式），月经，就这样！/ 到此为止！，上课节次

sentences.text: The retention period is 7 years.
sentences.translation: 保留期限是 7 年

sentences.text: End your sentence with a period.
sentences.translation: 用句号结束你的句子。

sentences.text: No, we're not doing that. Period.
sentences.translation: 不，我们不会这么做。就这样。

sentences.text: The teacher assigned homework in the last period.
sentences.translation: 老师在最后一节课布置了作业。

sentences.text: She's on her period.
sentences.translation: 她来月经了

sentences.text: probation period
sentences.translation: 试用期

sentences.text: Over a period of several months, we've observed the same issue recurring.
sentences.translation: 在几个月的期间内，我们观察到同样的问题反复出现。

sentences.text: This is an exciting period for the team with the new project.
sentences.translation: 对团队来说，这是一个令人兴奋的时期，因为有了新项目。

sentences.text: To clarify, 10:30 is my departure time, not arrival. Actually, it's too tight now
sentences.translation: 澄清一下，10:30 是我出发的时间，不是到达。其实现在时间太赶了

words.meaning: 碰巧 / 恰好 / 万一 / 正好  强调"不是有意安排的"，是巧合、偶然发生的。 比do you know 更礼貌

sentences.text: Happen to contain the same NRIC — do we overwrite it?
sentences.translation: 如果碰巧 / 恰好含有相同的 NRIC —— 我们要覆盖它吗？

sentences.text: We happened to meet at the coffee shop.
sentences.translation: 我们恰好在咖啡店遇见了。

sentences.text: These records happen to contain the same NRIC.
sentences.translation: 这些记录恰好含有相同的 NRIC

sentences.text: Do you happen to know where the meeting room is?
sentences.translation: 你是否碰巧知道会议室在哪？

sentences.text: It just so happens that I know him.
sentences.translation: 事情就是这么巧，我认识他

words.meaning: 已识别的 / 已发现的 / 已确认的

sentences.text: We identify new risks every quarter.
sentences.translation: 我们每季度识别新风险

sentences.text: We have identified the root cause of the issue
sentences.translation: 我们已经识别了问题的根本原因

sentences.text: The identified issues will be addressed by Q4.
sentences.translation: 已识别的问题将在 Q4 前解决

sentences.text: previously identified issues
sentences.translation: 之前识别的问题

sentences.text: risk identification
sentences.translation: 风险识别

sentences.text: Once identified, the vulnerability is escalated to the security team.
sentences.translation: 一旦识别，漏洞就会上报给安全团队

sentences.text: The issue was not previously identified during UAT and only surfaced in PROD.
sentences.translation: 该问题在 UAT 期间未被识别，仅在 PROD 中显现。

words.meaning: 意外地 / 不小心 ， 描述"错误 / 意外"

sentences.text: I accidentally deleted the file
sentences.translation: 我不小心删除了文件

sentences.text: Incidentally, we'll have a sync-up at 3 PM.
sentences.translation: 顺便说下，我们下午 3 点开碰头会。

sentences.text: sync

words.meaning: 协助 / 帮助（做某事）比 "help" 更正式、更书面

sentences.text: I will assist in resolving the issue.
sentences.translation: 我将协助解决这个问题

sentences.text: We're happy to assist with any technical queries.
sentences.translation: 我们乐意协助解答任何技术疑问。

sentences.text: Please assist Sydney in taking over Hubert's role.
sentences.translation: 请协助 Sydney 接手 Hubert 的角色。

sentences.text: We'll assist you with the migration going forward.
sentences.translation: 后续我们将协助您完成迁移。

sentences.text: Could you kindly assist with the script execution
We will assist in resolving the production issue and provide an update by EOD.
sentences.translation: 我们将协助解决生产问题，并在今天下班前提供更新。

sentences.text: Please let me know if I can assist further.
sentences.translation: 如需进一步协助，请告知

sentences.text: Feel free to reach out if you need assistance.
sentences.translation: 如需协助，欢迎随时联系。

sentences.text: Just to clarify.
clarifications

words.meaning: 如果你还没有（做过）的话，用来礼貌地提醒对方做一件事，同时不冒犯

sentences.text: Please loop in the DBA, if you haven't already.
sentences.translation: 请把 DBA 加进邮件链，如果你还没加的话。

sentences.text: If not done yet, please complete by Friday.
sentences.translation: 如果尚未完成，请在周五前完成。

sentences.text: If you haven't already had a chance to review the document, please do so by EOD tomorrow.
sentences.translation: 如果你还没来得及审阅文档，请在明天下班前完成。

sentences.text: If you haven't already done so, kindly complete the UAT this week.
sentences.translation: 如果您还未完成，请在本周内完成 UAT。

words.meaning: 一次性的交接/传递（技术、系统场景多

sentences.text: Handoff failed, didn't it?
sentences.translation: 交接失败了，是吗？

sentences.text: Not exactly — the handoff completed, but there was a validation error afterwards.
sentences.translation: 不完全是 —— 交接完成了，但之后出现了验证错误。

sentences.text: No, the handoff was successful. The issue is elsewhere.
sentences.translation: 没有，交接是成功的。问题在别处。

sentences.text: The handoff failed with a timeout error.
sentences.translation: 交接因超时错误失败。

words.meaning: 补救 / 修复 / 补救措施

sentences.text: The security team is working on the remediation of the vulnerabilities.
sentences.translation: 安全团队正在修复这些漏洞。

sentences.text: All identified issues require immediate remediation.
sentences.translation: 所有已识别的问题都需要立即修复

sentences.text: We have implemented the remediation actions as recommended.
sentences.translation: 我们已按建议实施了整改措施。

sentences.text: implemented
sentences.translation: 实施

sentences.text: as recommended.
sentences.translation: 按建议

sentences.text: vulnerabilities
sentences.translation: 漏洞

sentences.text: Correction
sentences.translation: 纠正数据错误

sentences.text: Repair
sentences.translation: 修复硬件、设备，恢复原状

sentences.text: Mitigation
sentences.translation: 减轻 / 缓解降低影响

sentences.text: We have prepared a comprehensive remediation  plan for the audit findings
sentences.translation: 针对审计发现的问题，我们制定了一份全面的整改计划。

sentences.text: Please raise an escalation if the issue is not resolved by end of day.
sentences.translation: 如果今天下班前问题没解决，请上报。

sentences.text: I need to escalate this issue to my manager.
sentences.translation: 我需要把这个问题上报给我的经理。

sentences.text: escalation procedure
sentences.translation: 升级流程

sentences.text: priority escalation
sentences.translation: 优先级升级

sentences.text: de-escalate
sentences.translation: 缓和 / 降级（反义词）

words.meaning: Due to" = "由于 / 因为 / 归因于;due to be ...（预定 / 计划）;书面 / 邮件 ⭐

sentences.text: The incident has been escalated from P3 to P2 due to increased user impact.
sentences.translation: 由于用户影响扩大，事件已从 P3 升级为 P2。

sentences.text: The report is due to be released next week.
sentences.translation: 报告预计下周发布

sentences.text: The success is largely due to the team's hard work.
sentences.translation: 成功很大程度归因于团队的努力。

sentences.text: The change was rejected due to insufficient testing.
sentences.translation: 变更因测试不足被拒绝。

sentences.text: Promotion
sentences.translation: 晋升

sentences.text: I want to raise an issue in today's meeting
sentences.translation: 我想在今天会议上提出一个问题（同层级）

sentences.text: I'd like to resolve this at our level first. If we can't reach an agreement, I may need to loop in [manager] for further guidance
sentences.translation: 我想我们先在我们这一层解决。如果达不成一致，可能需要请 [经理] 来进一步指导。

sentences.text: guidelines
sentences.translation: 指导方针

words.meaning: 缓解 / 减轻 / 缓解措施 不是消除问题本身（治标不治本）

sentences.text: We have implemented risk mitigation measures for the migration.
sentences.translation: 我们已为迁移实施了风险缓解措施。

sentences.text: We're taking steps to mitigate the impact on customers.
sentences.translation: 我们正在采取措施以减轻对客户的影响。

sentences.text: mitigate the damage
sentences.translation: 减少损失

sentences.text: mitigate the impact
sentences.translation: 减轻影响

sentences.text: We have implemented mitigation measures to reduce impact, while working on the permanent remediation.
sentences.translation: 我们已实施缓解措施以降低影响，同时着手永久整改。

sentences.text: measures

words.meaning: 实施 / 落地 / 执行，把想法 / 计划 / 政策变成真实运行的东西

sentences.text: implemented
sentences.translation: 过去式

sentences.text: We will implement the new authentication system next quarter.
sentences.translation: 我们将在下季度实施新的身份验证系统

sentences.text: implementing
sentences.translation: 进行时

sentences.text: The team is implementing the caching mechanism to improve performance.
sentences.translation: 团队正在实施缓存机制以提升性能

sentences.text: implementation
sentences.translation: 实施 / 落地 名词

sentences.text: The changes will be implemented as per the approved CR.
sentences.translation: 变更将按已批准的 CR 实施。  implemented as per是 按照…实施

sentences.text: the caching mechanism
sentences.translation: 缓存机制

sentences.text: Gradually implemented in phases.
sentences.translation: 分阶段逐步实施。

sentences.text: approval
recommended
as per the audit report.
issues
detect similar issues.
sentences.translation: 检测类似问题

words.meaning: 精确执行，按步骤代码、战略

sentences.text: Execute the deployment script.
sentences.translation: 执行部署脚本

words.meaning: 履行，测试  "日常操作" "履行职责/操作动作"

sentences.text: perform the task

words.meaning: 有组织地开展" "研究、调查、评估"类活动

sentences.text: Conduct impact assessment on/for change request
carry out the approved change
Despite the tight timeline, we have successfully implemented all the required security controls.
sentences.translation: 尽管时间紧迫，我们还是成功落实了所有必要的安全管控。

sentences.text: In spite of initial resistance from some teams, the new AI governance framework has been rolled out successfully.
sentences.translation: 尽管一开始有些团队抵触，新的 AI 治理框架还是成功落地了。

sentences.text: Regardless of your role or department, you are required to comply with the PDPA guidelines.
sentences.translation: 无论你的岗位或部门，你都必须遵守 PDPA 指南。

sentences.text: Although it was raining, we went out.
sentences.translation: 虽然在下雨，我出去了

sentences.text: Even though he tried hard, he failed.
sentences.translation: 尽管他努力了，但他还是失败了。

sentences.text: He likes tea, whereas I like coffee.
sentences.translation: 他喜欢茶，而我喜欢咖啡。

words.meaning: 然而 / 但是 / 不过，正式用语，邮件

sentences.text: The plan looks good. However, we need to consider the cost.
sentences.translation: 计划看起来不错。然而，我们需要考虑成本。

sentences.text: However we look at it, the issue must be resolved.
sentences.translation: 无论我们怎么看，问题必须解决

sentences.text: However small the change, it needs approval.
sentences.translation: 无论变更多小，都需要审批。

sentences.text: The plan is expensive. Nevertheless, we should proceed.
sentences.translation: 尽管贵，但仍然要做（强调"仍然"）

sentences.text: The plan looks feasible. However, that said, we should still validate with the DBA before proceeding
sentences.translation: 计划看起来可行。话虽如此，我们仍应在推进前与 DBA 确认。

sentences.text: However, that said
sentences.translation: 顶级邮件转折句式 这是新加坡职场 / 商务邮件里超级地道的委婉转折

sentences.text: all core modules
sentences.translation: 所有核心模块

words.meaning: 首次遇见、找到、意识到;东西存在但未知

sentences.text: We discovered a bug during testing.
sentences.translation: 我们在测试中发现了一个 bug。

sentences.text: A great discovery.
sentences.translation: 好的发现

words.meaning: 揭露 / 揭开;东西被隐藏 / 遮盖

sentences.text: The root cause analysis uncovered a design flaw
sentences.translation: 根因分析揭露了一个设计缺陷

words.meaning: 发生 / 出现 / 存在

sentences.text: Changes occur as needed.
sentences.translation: 变更按需发生。

sentences.text: An unexpected outage occurred last night.
sentences.translation: 昨晚发生了意外停机。

sentences.text: It occurs to me that this might be a data issue.
sentences.translation: 我突然想到这可能是数据问题。

words.meaning: 从看不见 / 未知变成看得见 / 已知 come up with (想出) ⭐⭐⭐ come up in (被提到) ⭐⭐⭐ come up against (遇到) ⭐⭐ come up short (未达标) ⭐⭐ come up empty (一无所获) ⭐⭐ 📌 常见句式： Something came up (有事)

sentences.text: His name came up during the discussion.
sentences.translation: 讨论中提到了他的名字。

sentences.text: The deadline is coming up on Friday.
sentences.translation: 截止日期即将到来，就在周五。

sentences.text: Nothing came up during our analysis.
sentences.translation: 分析中没有得出任何结论。

sentences.text: The waiter came up to take our order.
sentences.translation: 服务员走过来记录我们的点单。

sentences.text: The team came up with three options.
sentences.translation: 团队提出了三个选项。

sentences.text: We need to come up with a solution by EOD.
sentences.translation: 我们需要在下班前想出一个解决方案。Come up with" = "想出 / 提出（方案、主意）" —— 你一定要掌握

sentences.text: Sorry, something came up at the last minute. Can we reschedule the meeting to next week?
sentences.translation: 抱歉，最后一刻有事**。我们可以把会议改到下周吗？

sentences.text: The investigation came up empty
sentences.translation: 调查一无所获

sentences.text: Our test coverage came up short at 60%.
sentences.translation: 我们的测试覆盖率未达标**，只有 60%

sentences.text: We came up against a licensing issue during the migration.
sentences.translation: 我们在迁移期间遭遇了一个许可证问题。

sentences.text: I'll let you know as it comes up
sentences.translation: 一有情况我会告诉你。

sentences.text: Could you cover for me while I'm on leave
sentences.translation: 我请假时你能顶替我吗？
